reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the countries associated with Barry Unsworth and P. G. Wodehouse.
2. Compare the countries and return whether they are the same.
original_final_question: Are both Barry Unsworth and P. G. Wodehouse from the same country? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Barry Unsworth was born in England, and P. G. Wodehouse is described as an English author, so they are from the same country. -> yes
